infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GeoCore needs access to your camera so you can photograph items you want to list for sale or include in chat messages.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GeoCore needs access to your photo library so you can select pictures for your listings and chat messages.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: GeoCore needs permission to save photos you download from listings to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GeoCore uses your location to show nearby listings, auctions, and delivery requests, and to set the location of items you post.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GeoCore needs access to your microphone to record voice messages in chat.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This identifier will be used to deliver personalized listings and relevant recommendations to you.

plugins.photosPermission: GeoCore needs access to your photo library so you can select pictures for your listings and chat messages.
plugins.cameraPermission: GeoCore needs access to your camera so you can photograph items you want to list for sale.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GeoCore uses your location to show nearby listings, auctions, and delivery requests.
